attributes.action: Consider the safety of Artificial Intelligence, Artificial Super Intelligence
attributes.additional_details: There is enough evidence of concern in the public domain to consider that safety is not sufficient to match the progress, and there doesn’t appear to be an active discussion or plan to consider the replacement of human labour and the impact on the working populace in terms of replacement income, self worth and this needs to be considered in light of past knowledge of advancements, such as the luddites. There is no objection to Ai implementation with Safe progress
attributes.background: An urgent review into the progress of Ai and Super Ai, whether sufficient evidence exists to demonstrate that it is future proof and safe, and what is the plan in the instance of Ai replacement of human labour.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Review and Regulate AI to Protect Jobs and Prevent Mass Unemployment" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/753437
